title: Calonema discoideum

This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can aid in treating various ailments such as wounds, fever, and digestive issues. In traditional herbal medicine, Calonema discoideum is commonly prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications to treat skin conditions and wounds.
